hero.headline: Sabon gida yana farawa da sanin tuni.
hero.subheadline: Wayfinder yana neman abubuwan taimakon da kuka cancanta, yayi ma'ana a harshensa, kuma yana gabatarwa mataki-mataki, kafin lokaci ya wuce.

how.title: Mataki uku daga iso zuwa shawara.

steps.title: Ka gida domin mu san labarika
steps.body: Amsa wasu tambaye masu saukit, ɗaya-ɗaya, a harshinka. Manyan rubutu, saukin sauki, babu gaggawa.

steps.title: Mu nemo abin da ya dace
steps.body: Wayfinder yana bincika maye-maye abubuwan taimakon Amurka da yana nuna abin da ka cancanta jiya, tare da tushen, ba tsikici ba.

steps.title: Aiki a lokaci
steps.body: Ka sami shawara da aka rangama da dako, tare da bayani na kowane takarda da gida gaida sa tumanin iko kusa.

features.title: Komai da kake bukatar, a wuri gida.

items.title: Shawara na Aiki Nawa
items.body: Abubuwan taimakon nawa da aka rangama da kofar dako kari, kowannensu tare da dalilin sarili haushi ka cancanta da kirja dago lokaci.

items.title: AI Gida Taimakon Takarda
items.body: Wayfinder yana bayani kowane fili kuma yana tsara amsa a harshinka. Kai ba ya taɓa hannu lamarin sirri ba, kuma kai ba ya taɓa ikirau komai ba.

items.title: Akwatin Takarada
items.body: Ajiye pasipota, I-94, da EAD a wuri gida na gida. Sirri, kuma kai ba a taɓa karata tare ba.

items.title: Nemo Taimakon
items.body: Don abin kariya, Wayfinder yana tabbatar ka zuwa kariya mai-laisini ko kuma mai-izini kusa. Mutum, ba tsikici ba.

languagesSection.title: A kalaman ka, daga nuni na farko.
languagesSection.body: Zaɓi harshinka kafin ka bugi, kuma Wayfinder yana magana a harshinti ko'ina, mataki-mataki.

trust.title: Mu kai ba sa taɓa karata ba tare da jiya kariya ba.
trust.body: Takarada naka yana kulle kuma kai gida kawai. Wayfinder kai ba ya taɓa tunani lamarin sirli ba, kai ba ya taɓa ikirau takardun ba, kuma komai kariya yana yanke da gaida, ba na jiya ba.

finalCta.title: Tunininka yana farawa jiya.
finalCta.body: Bure, sirli, kuma a harshinka. Nemo abin da ka cancanta a mintuna.

footer.tagline: Ba shawara kariya ba · Koyaushe an tabbatar da jida

lpr_from_humanitarian.label: Karuwar kura daga mahara, asylee, ko karya
lpr_from_humanitarian.note: Wannan yana maido da SNAP da Medicaid karya

us_citizen.label: Amurka Ƙasa ko Amurka Ƙasa Mutane

other_none.label: Waje, ba ni sure, ko babu su

language.question: Wane harshi ka fi so?
language.hint: Za mu nuna komai a harshinin nan.

scan.question: Ka da takardan? Ɗauki hoto domin a kuɓuta lokaci
scan.intro: Snapu hoto na I-94 (da takarda aiki, karuwar kura, ko wasikar karya idan ka da su). Za mu karanta halinka da zayita don ba ka da bugu.
scan.secureLine: Takardan naka ana aiki tare da kulle a wannan lokaci kuma kai ba a taɓa ajiye su a saiki ba ko karata tare da jiya kariya. Mu ƙaranta gida fili kawai - kai ba iyakar Haɓaka ba ko A-Lambar ba.
scan.uploadAriaLabel: Ajiye hoto ko PDF na takardan karya
scan.fileTypes: JPEG, PNG, ko PDF · har zuwa takardan 4
scan.skip: Ba ni da takardan - amsa tambaye a maimakon sa
scan.errorReadFailed: Ba mu iya karanta takardan ba. Jita zai gaida amma, ko tsalle kuma amsa tambaye.
scan.errorUnreachable: Ba mu iya kai karanta ba. Jita zai gaida amma, ko tsalle kuma amsa tambaye.

confirm.question: Jira karbe abin da mu karanta daga takardan
confirm.intro: Kariyar taimakon naka ta dogara a abubuwan nan, sabili haka ka dauki lokaci domin tabbata. Taɓa fili komai domin gyara.
confirm.secureLine: Kulle karanta kuma ba ajiye ba.
confirm.lowConfidence: Wasu abubuwan sun kasance masu wahala karanta (nadi tabbatarwa). Jira zaɓi waɗansu da farko.

fields.fullNameHint: Domin takaradun naka kawai - ba amiƙi karya ba.
fields.dateOfBirthHint: Saita shekara naka domin shawara na shekara.
fields.statusGrantDateHint: Mahara/asylee bayar ranar (SSI shekara 7 kirja). Bayani ba wajib ba.

status.question: Menene halinka karya a yanzu?
status.hint: Zaɓi gida da ya dace kaɗan. Wannan yana bugi kusan kowane kariya kaida.

documents.question: Wasu tambaye masu sauki na takardan
documents.hint: Taɓa Ee ko A'a. Ba matsala idan ba ka da waje.
documents.i94Hint: Shaidar shiga. I-94 na karuwa §207 ko 'Visa 93' yana tabbatar halinka mahara.
documents.eadHint: Taimakon Amiƙi Aiki. EAD karuwa A03 kuma yana tabbatar halinka mahara.
documents.ssnHint: Mu ƙaƙa na san idan ka da gida - kai ba lambar nan ba.

orrLetter.question: Ka da wasikar ƙarfafawa ORR ko aminci?
orrLetter.hint: Masu jiya saci suke bukar wasikar nan (ba I-94 ba) domin shiga abubuwan taimakon ORR kamar RCA da RMA.

eligibilityDate.question: Yaushe taimakon mahara naka ya farawa offishali?
eligibilityDate.hint: Wannan shine ranar aminci ORR - yawancin lokaci ranar zo ko ranar halinka, ko zai yi banza.

arrivalDate.question: Yaushe ka zo Amurka?
arrivalDate.hint: Yawancin aiki kuma haɓaka abubuwan yana yin zuwa shekara 5 daga wannan ranar.

statusGrantDate.question: Yaushe an bayar maka halinka mahara ko asylee?
statusGrantDate.hint: Karya SSI yana ƙare shekara 7 daga wannan ranar. Tsalle idan ba ka sure ba.

location.question: Wane jihar ka zauna?
location.hint: Abubuwan taimakon da gida taimakon sune daban da jiha. Gari kuma ZIP sun bayani ba wajib.

household.question: Gida domin mu san gidanka
household.hint: Waɗannan amsa yana saita lamarin akai. Su ne sirli.
household.ageFromDoc: Shekara naka ({age}) an saita daga takardan. Ka iya jiya a tabbatarwa shafi.
household.sizeLabel: Nawa mutane suke zauna tare, da ka?
household.incomeLabel: Kuɗi gidanka ke samu kowa, kafin haraaji (Dolayin Amurka). Ajiye 0 idan babu.

children.question: Nawa yara suke zauna tare?
children.under19Label: Nawa yara da kasua 19 suke zauna tare?
children.subsetHint: Wannan ƙarami ɓangare na lamarin saanan.

pregnantCash.question: Tambaye biyu masu sauki game da gidanka
pregnantCash.pregnantLabel: Ka da dan ciki a gidanka yanzu?
pregnantCash.pregnantHint: WIC da waje Medicaid abubuwan yana kara dan ciki.
pregnantCash.cashLabel: Ka yisan kuɗi taimakon (TANF, SSI, ko gida taimakon)?
pregnantCash.cashHint: Wannan yana bugi aminci domin Mahara Kuɗi Taimakon kuma SNAP.

special.question: Waje na takaita abubuwan
special.hint: Taɓa Ee ko A'a domin kowa.
special.unaccompaniedLabel: Ka kasua 18 kuma a Amurka babu iyaye ko mai-kunna?
special.unaccompaniedHint: Domin shawara na Mahara Walaye ba Taimakon.
special.blindLabel: Ka faru ko ba ka da wajen da ya kusan ba?
special.workQuartersLabel: Kai ko kanka ko iyayen naka sun aiki a Amurka kusan shekara 10?
special.workQuartersHint: Aiki karya 40 za ta bugi waje karya domin SSI kuma SNAP.

goals.question: Menene abubuwan da ka so abubuwa?
goals.hint: Wannan yana bugi mu nemo shawaran gida domin ka.
goals.employmentLabel: Ka aiki ko nema aiki ko horo aiki?
goals.employmentHint: Abubuwan aiki, taimakon yara, Daidaita Bayani.
goals.businessLabel: Ka so farawa ko haɓaka nawa kasua?
goals.businessHint: Rasta haɓaka da Jiya Haɓaka Akai (IDA).
goals.englishLabel: Ka so kalantu Turanci (ESL)? (bayani ba wajib)
goals.englishHint: Bure Turanci harshi horo ta Mahara Taimakon.
goals.interpreterLabel: Ka bukar mai-janya ko taimakon fassara? (bayani ba wajib)
goals.interpreterHint: Bure janya abubuwan yana samuwa ta mahara abubuwan.

settingsForm.eligibilityDateLabel: Yaushe taimakon mahara naka ya farawa offishali? (ranar aminci ORR)
settingsForm.statusGrantDateLabel: Yaushe an bayar maka halinka mahara ko asylee? (bayani ba wajib)

errors.saveFailed: Ba mu iya ajiye amsa naka ba: {message}. Idan wannan ya nada tsara ba da jiya, kaida gyara (supabase/migration_v2.sql) ba ta aiwatar ba.
errors.profileNotFound: Ba mu iya nemo profaila naka domin ajiye amsa. Jira fita kuma shiga, sannan jita zai gaida.
errors.profileNotFoundShort: Ba mu iya nemo profaila domin ajiye. Jira fita kuma shiga, sannan jita zai gaida.

processing.title: Neman abubuwan taimakon naka…
processing.subtitle: Mu yana jira amsa naka dangane da kaida U.S. abubuwan taimakon. Wannan yawancin lokaci ya dauki kusan sakunin 30.
processing.readySubtitle: Mu gano abubuwan taimakon ka iya canacanta.

actionPlan.title: Shawara na Aiki Naka
actionPlan.subtitle: Rangama da dako mafi gaggawa ta farko.
actionPlan.attorney: Wannan yana bukar attoney ko aminci mai-izini.
actionPlan.noResults: Ba abubuwan taimakon aminci gano. Amsa waje tambaye ko tunani gida masaniya domin taimakon.

documents.title: Takardan Nawa
documents.subtitle: Fili naka yana kulle kuma sirli. Mu kai ba sa taɓa karata tare da jiya kariya ba.
documents.dragDrop: Juye kuma tsada fili, ko taɓa domin zaɓi
documents.deleteConfirm: Ka tabbata ka so tsoke takardan nan?
documents.secureLine: Takardan naka ana aiki tare da kulle kuma kai ba a taɓa karata tare da jiya kariya ba.

formHelper.title: Taimakon Takarda
formHelper.subtitle: Ka taimakon tunanin kuma cika takarda. Mu kai ba sa bugi SSN, A-lambar, banki ɗaya, ko pasipota lambar - su ne sirli.
formHelper.pasteInstructions: Baki-baki sunin takarda ko URL, ko bayani abin da ka bukar taimakon:
formHelper.placeholder: Misali: I-765 Amiƙi Aiki, ko "taimakon cika Medicaid bugi"
formHelper.sensitiveNote: Filin da aka nadi [KA CIKI] ta lamari sirli - ƙare waɗannan da ka.
formHelper.legalNote: Wannan takarda ta bugi halinka karya naka. Jira yin aiki tare da attoney mai-laisini ko DOJ-aminci mai-izini.
formHelper.secureLine: Fili naka ana aiki tare da kulle kuma kai ba a taɓa karata tare da jiya kariya ba.
formHelper.contextNote: Wayfinder yana amfani da bayani da ka yisan ta hadaddiya domin amsa domin yanayin naka.

explainer.title: Fassara Wasikar ko Takarda
explainer.subtitle: Baki-baki ko ajiye wasikar ko takardan da ba ta fahimta. Za mu fassara a saukin sauki.
explainer.placeholder: Baki-baki rubutu na wasikar ko takarda a nan…
explainer.orUpload: Ko ajiye hoto ko scan na takardan:

findHelp.title: Nemo Taimakon Kusa
findHelp.subtitle: Tabbatar tare da mutane da suke bugar - bure gyara abubuwan, kariya taimakon, da jihar mahara ofis.
findHelp.attorneyWarning: Mahimmi: Domin abin kariya da bugi halinka karya naka, gida attoney mai-laisini ko DOJ-aminci mai-izini za ta ka ba shawara kariya kuma iya wakilta.
findHelp.noState: Zaɓi jiha domin ga gida masaniya.

progress.title: Ci Gaban Nawa
progress.subtitle: Bincika ina ka tare da kowa ne taimakon.

footer.privacy: Bayani naka yana kulle kuma sirli. Mu kai ba sa taɓa karata tare da jiya kariya ba.
footer.disclaimer: Wayfinder ba ta ba shawara kariya ba.

settings.title: Saitunan
settings.subtitle: Badi harshi ko sabunta amsa da ka bayar wajen bugi.
settings.languageHint: Zaɓi harshi domin komai app. Yana sabunta sannan.
settings.editInfoHint: Badi amsa da ka bayar wajen bugi. Za mu jira abubuwan taimakon kaida.

formFill.title: Cika takarda naka
formFill.intro: Mu cika abin da mu yisan. Jira jira kowa fili kafin sauke.
formFill.secureLine: Takarda naka yana cika a browser kuma kai ba a taɓa karata tare da jiya kariya ba.
formFill.sensitive: Sirli — ba ka karhe tare ba. Ajiye kafau.
formFill.noFields: Wannan takarda ba ta da fillable akwati. Ka iya rubutu olova wurin da aka nadi.
formFill.loadError: Ba mu iya bufi takarda nan ba. Jira takarda daban.
formFill.uploadHint: Ajiye I-94, takarda aiki, ko waje takardan a Takardan domin cika abubuwan nan akai.

errors.generic: Abubuwa sun dace. Jira zai gaida.
errors.signIn: Imel ko kalmar sirri ba daidai ba.
errors.signUp: Ba mu iya ƙirƙira akaunt ba. Jira zai gaida.
errors.eligibility: Ba mu iya lodi abubuwan taimakon ba. Jira zai gaida.
errors.upload: Ajiye ta gaji. Jira fili karama ko kaida daban.
